ops.title: Migrate all pack consumers (getaway, cc-context, cc-present) to attach-only + declared dependency
ops.description: Plan step 3: each consumer ships attach-only hooks.json with the uvx --isolated prefix, plugin.json dependency on captain-hook (version floor), marketplace allowCrossMarketplaceDependenciesOn, capt-hook pack lint in CI, plugin version bump. getaway additionally drops run PostToolUse/Stop (kills the live Stop gate double-dispatch) and removes committed hooks/__pycache__ if present. cc-context bump gated on matching binary release assets.

ops.text: all three consumer hooks.json files contain a single uvx --isolated capt-hook pack attach entry and zero capt-hook run entries
each plugin.json declares the captain-hook dependency and each marketplace.json carries allowCrossMarketplaceDependenciesOn
capt-hook pack lint green in each repo's CI; all three pushed with version bumps and green workflows
live smoke: exactly one sync capt-hook run Stop dispatch per Stop with captain-hook + getaway enabled
